result.stderr:
openapi-to-terraform.Main 1.0.0
Copyright (c) Addison Waldow 2021

  -f, --input-file             Required. Absolute or relative path to OpenAPI
                               input file

  -o, --output-dir             Required. Absolute or relative path of output
                               directory for terraform files

  -r, --revision-map-file      (Not Implemented) Absolute or relative path to
                               revision mapping json file

  -t, --terraform-vars-file    Absolute or relative path to file mapping
                               terraform variables to output values

  -p, --provider               (Default: azurerm) One of { azurerm }. Defaults
                               to azurerm

  --provider-version           (Default: v2.45.1) Version of the provider to
                               use. Defaults to v2.45.1

  --api-template-file          (Not Implemented) Absolute or relative path to
                               desired template of APIs terraform file

  --operation-template-file    (Not Implemented) Absolute or relative path to
                               desired template of Operations terraform file

  --policies                   (Not Implemented) Absolute or relative path to
                               directory containing APIM policies. Requires
                               -r/--revision-map-file to be provided if revision
                               dependent policies are desired

  --help                       Display this help screen.

  --version                    Display version information.
